productDisplayName: Black Coffee Men Striped Charcoal Trousers
description: Composition Charcoal grey trousers made of blended polyviscose fabric, has a flat front, two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back and metal zipper and button closure at the waist Fit black coffee Smart Fit Wash care Hand/machine wash in cold water with mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Drip dry in shade Warm iron Formal attire on 'Dress-Up Thursday' gets a powerful twist with these trousers from Black Coffee. Made from the choicest of fabrics, they are perfect for office wear. These trousers don't just look great they are also comfortable enough to be worn all day long. Pair them with a shirt for a formal look. Model statistics The product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
